notes: T19 keeps QA_canonical at 13/13 and QA_multihop at 7/7 over abox_linked.ttl.
The residual whitelist stayed restricted to the five active and two blocked families detected in T18.
Graph linking gap improved from 7 to 6, which is directionally positive but not yet a material reduction.
Missing value surface stayed flat at 2 and synthesis surface gap worsened from 5 to 7 in the latest sandbox rerun, so another graph-wide structural phase is not justified.
A small T20 focused on evidence selection and response surface over the already linked graph is a better next step than opening a second manual immediately.
A stable subset of five sandbox questions is already promotable to formal evaluation in parallel with that minor cleanup.
